title: BEM-920 worker request
objective:

Status: SENT_TO_CURATOR
Route: External GPT auditor -> Curator -> Worker -> Curator -> external mailbox
Objective: prepare a new system evolution protocol after Claude audit APPROVED_WITH_REQUIREMENTS for BEM-919 plus operator remarks.
Context:
- Protocol v1.7 created baseline and BEM-907..BEM-913 remediation partial pass.
- BEM-919 restored full-system focus, not Telegram-only.
- Claude approved BEM-919 with mandatory requirements.
- Operator requested a new protocol and separately requested existing/new object and element prompts for operator approval.
Mandatory Claude requirements:
1. Create governance/state/elements_registry.json for all elements.
2. Create prompts for WRK-C1, WRK-C2, WRK-C3 by curator_prompt pattern.

5. dispatch consumer auto-trigger on queue item added.

8. BEM-925 definition of done: deterministic runner + state files + role reports = PASS; LLM runtime is next operator-gated stage.

10. concurrency groups for core workflows.
11. report_period_config.json has version and owner: OPERATOR.
12. BEM-923 gate has explicit secret names without values.
13. BEM-928 bundle checklist fixed before bundle assembly.
Required protocol output:
- Full system protocol, not Telegram-only.
- Analysis of v1.7 done/partial/not done.
- Incorporate Claude requirements as roadmap acceptance criteria.
- Separate existing prompts and new required prompts for objects/elements.
- Include operator approval table for prompt changes.
- Update roadmap BEM-920..BEM-928 or BEM-921..BEM-929 if needed, but keep requirements mapped clearly.

Worker must assess coherence, executability, and whether prompt/register work is first priority.
Expected status: APPROVED_WITH_NOTES or BLOCKED_WITH_REASON.
No issue comments.
